name: DigitalOcean
description: Manage Droplets, Databases, Kubernetes clusters, and Domains via the DigitalOcean API.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: Interact with the DigitalOcean API to manage Droplets (VMs), Databases, Kubernetes clusters, Domains, Volumes, and more.

tools.name: list_droplets
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Droplets (virtual machines) in the account.

per_page.desc: Number of items to return per page (max 200).

tag_name.desc: Filter Droplets by a specific tag.

tools.name: get_droplet
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific Droplet by its ID.

droplet_id.desc: The unique numeric ID of the Droplet.

region.desc: Region slug to create the Droplet in (e.g. nyc1, sfo3, lon1).

size.desc: Size slug for the Droplet (e.g. s-1vcpu-1gb, s-2vcpu-4gb).

image.desc: OS image slug or ID (e.g. ubuntu-22-04-x64, debian-11-x64).

ssh_keys.desc: Array of SSH key IDs or fingerprints to embed in the Droplet.

backups.desc: Enable automatic backups for the Droplet.

tags.desc: Array of tag names to apply to the Droplet.

tools.name: delete_droplet
tools.description: Delete a Droplet by its ID.

droplet_id.desc: The unique numeric ID of the Droplet to delete.

tools.name: list_databases
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all managed database clusters.

tag_name.desc: Filter database clusters by a specific tag.

tools.name: get_database
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific managed database cluster.

database_cluster_uuid.desc: The UUID of the database cluster.

tools.name: list_domains
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all domains managed in the account.

per_page.desc: Number of items to return per page.

tools.name: get_domain
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific domain.

domain_name.desc: The domain name to retrieve (e.g. example.com).

tools.name: list_domain_records
tools.description: Retrieve all DNS records for a domain.

domain_name.desc: The domain name to retrieve DNS records for.

type.desc: Filter records by type: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, NS, SRV, CAA.

tools.name: list_kubernetes_clusters
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Kubernetes clusters in the account.

per_page.desc: Number of items to return per page.

tools.name: list_volumes
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all block storage volumes in the account.

region.desc: Filter volumes by region slug (e.g. nyc1).

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Retrieve information about the authenticated DigitalOcean account.
